findings.description: PascalCase class names `HttpURLConnection`, `HttpRequestMethodEnum`, and `MessageSenderSettings` appear in the source content (code examples and the redirect note) but are absent from the hints list.
findings.source_evidence: `createHttpConnection(String targetUrl, HttpRequestMethodEnum method, Map<String, List<String>> headerInfo)` and `HttpURLConnection httpConnection = super.createHttpConnection(...)` in CustomHttpProtocolBasicClient code; `HttpMessagingClient.sendSync(MessageSenderSettings, SyncMessage)` in the note.
